title: Unit Testing World Settings
description: Startup settings for the XREngine Unit Testing World. Use this schema with the JSONC settings files. Hover descriptions explain what each property controls, and enum-backed properties expose selectable values in VS Code.

$schema.description: Optional schema pointer used by editors. Ignored by the runtime loader.

$id.description: Optional document identifier. Not consumed by the runtime settings loader.

WorldKind.description: Selects which unit-test world factory the editor or server boots into.

VisualizeOctree.description: Draws octree structure overlays for visibility and partitioning diagnostics.

VisualizeQuadtree.description: Draws quadtree structure overlays for visibility and partitioning diagnostics.

EditorType.description: Selects which editor UI pipeline is created for the unit-testing world.

CameraUIDrawSpaceOnInit.description: Initial draw-space mode for camera UI surfaces.

TransformTool.description: Enables the transform gizmo tool in the unit-testing world.

AllowEditingInVR.description: Allows scene editing interactions while VR is active. Leave this off when you want a pure runtime test without editor manipulation.

PreviewVRStereoViews.description: Shows stereo eye previews in non-VR windows while VR is active.

VideoStreamingAudio.description: When video streaming is enabled, also route audio from the stream.

VideoStreamingUrl.description: Source URL used by the video-streaming test content.

UltralightWebView.description: Enables the Ultralight web-view test content.

UltralightWebViewUrl.description: Initial URL for the Ultralight web-view test content.

EnableProfilerLogging.description: Enables profiler logging output for startup and runtime diagnostics.

RiveUI.description: Adds the Rive UI test content.

GPURenderDispatch.description: Enables GPU-driven render dispatch paths instead of the more conventional CPU-driven cull-and-submit path. This is experimental rendering work rather than the conservative default.

StartInPlayModeWithoutTransitions.description: Starts directly in play mode and skips editor transition flows.

Skybox.description: Adds the default skybox to the scene.

DeferredDecal.description: Adds the deferred decal test content.

AddCameraVRPickup.description: Adds the camera pickup VR interaction test content.

ForceDebugOpaquePipeline.description: Forces the debug opaque pipeline instead of the normal material-driven opaque path.

SpotLight.description: Adds a spotlight to the scene.

DirLight2.description: Adds a secondary directional light for lighting stress tests.

PointLight.description: Adds a point light to the scene.

LightProbe.description: Adds the realtime light-probe test content used for image-based lighting and probe capture validation.

LightProbeCaptureMs.description: Target light-probe capture interval in milliseconds.

StopRealtimeCaptureSec.description: Optional timeout, in seconds, after which realtime capture stops. Use null to keep capturing indefinitely.

VRPawn.description: Spawns the VR pawn and enables the VR-side test setup. Pair this with UseOpenXR or EmulatedVRPawn depending on the runtime path you want.

UseOpenXR.description: Selects OpenXR instead of the default tested OpenVR path for VR.

EmulatedVRPawn.description: Uses the emulated VR pawn for desktop-driven VR testing.

Locomotion.description: Enables locomotion logic on the spawned pawn. This matters primarily when a VR or character pawn is active.

ThirdPersonPawn.description: Spawns the third-person pawn instead of a VR-only setup.

CharacterControllerCapsuleTranslationY.description: Optional Y offset applied to the character-controller capsule. Use null to leave the engine default.

PhysicsChain.description: Adds the chain physics test content.

AddPhysics.description: Initializes the selected physics backend and enables physics-driven test content. This should be on for PhysX/Jolt/Jitter behavior checks.

PhysicsBallCount.description: Number of test physics balls to spawn in the physics test content.

ModelsToImport.description: Models imported during startup. Each entry can target different import and material settings.

SoundNode.description: Adds the sound-node audio test content.

Microphone.description: Enables microphone capture in the unit-testing world.

AttachMicToAnimatedModel.description: Attaches the microphone source to the animated model when both features are active.

AudioArchitectureV2.description: Toggles the second-generation audio architecture path before startup applies audio overrides into the engine singleton.

AudioTransport.description: Audio transport backend used by the runtime audio layer.

AudioEffects.description: Audio effects processor used by the runtime audio layer.

VMC.description: Enables the VMC avatar-streaming test path for external motion data ingest.

LipSync.description: Enables lip-sync test content on applicable avatar setups.

AnimationClipVMD.description: Loads a VMD animation clip path instead of or in addition to other clip tests, depending on the world setup.

AnimationClipAnim.description: Loads an .anim animation clip during startup.

AnimClipPath.description: Path to the animation clip asset loaded by the clip test path.

AnimLooped.description: Loops the test animation clip when true.

HumanoidPoseAuditEnabled.description: Enables humanoid pose-audit capture during animation playback.

HumanoidPoseAuditOutputPath.description: Output file path for pose-audit capture data.

HumanoidPoseAuditReferencePath.description: Optional reference pose-audit file used for comparisons.

HumanoidPoseAuditComparisonOutputPath.description: Optional output path for comparison results against the reference audit file.

HumanoidPoseAuditSampleRateOverride.description: Optional sample-rate override for pose auditing, in samples per second.

TestAnimation.description: Enables the broader animation test setup beyond loading an individual clip file.

AllowShaderPipelines.description: Enables separable shader-program pipelines where supported by the selected renderer. Useful for pipeline experiments, but the editor notes this can break some debug-shape rendering and may be slower than linked programs.

RenderMeshBounds.description: Draws imported mesh bounds for debugging.

RenderAPI.description: Rendering backend to initialize for the unit-testing world.

PhysicsAPI.description: Physics backend to initialize for the unit-testing world.

RecalcChildMatricesType.description: Controls how child transform matrix recalculation is scheduled.

TickGroupedItemsInParallel.description: When true, grouped tick items are executed in parallel where the engine supports it.

SinglePassStereoVR.description: Enables single-pass stereo rendering for VR where supported.

RenderPhysicsDebug.description: Draws physics debug visualization for the selected physics backend.

RenderWindowsWhileInVR.description: Keeps desktop render windows active while VR is running so you can monitor output or debug from the desktop at the same time.

RenderTransformDebugInfo.description: Enables transform debug rendering. Individual shape toggles below further refine what is drawn.

RenderTransformPoints.description: Draw transform debug points when transform debug rendering is enabled.

RenderTransformCapsules.description: Draw transform debug capsules when transform debug rendering is enabled.

RenderTransformLines.description: Draw transform debug lines when transform debug rendering is enabled.

BackgroundShader.description: Enables the background shader test path.

AddCharacterIK.description: Adds character IK components to applicable animated characters so imported humanoids can run extra IK-specific tests.

CreateUnitBox.description: Creates the default unit box test object.

RenderFPS.description: Target rate for the render loop. Set to 0 for uncapped rendering.

UpdateFPS.description: Target rate for the main update loop. Set to 0 to leave the loop uncapped if supported by the runtime.

FixedFPS.description: Target rate for the fixed-timestep simulation loop, typically physics and deterministic ticks.

UnitTestEditorType.markdownDescription: Supported values: `None`, `Native`, `IMGUI`. The repo currently recommends `IMGUI` for day-to-day editor work.

Enabled.description: When false, this model import entry is ignored.

Kind.description: Whether this import should be treated as a static or animated model.

MaterialMode.description: Material/shader pipeline family used for this imported model.

UseForwardForTransparent.description: When true and MaterialMode is Deferred, alpha-textured materials are routed through the forward lit path for proper transparency.

Path.description: Asset-relative path to the model file to import.

ImportFlags.description: Comma-separated Assimp PostProcessSteps flags. These are parsed as enum flag names, so keep the exact symbolic names separated by commas.
ImportFlags.markdownDescription:
Comma-separated Assimp `PostProcessSteps` flags. Keep the exact symbolic names separated by commas. Common presets:

- Static environment mesh: `CalculateTangentSpace, JoinIdenticalVertices, Triangulate, GenerateNormals, SplitLargeMeshes, ImproveCacheLocality, OptimizeGraph, OptimizeMeshes, SortByPrimitiveType, FlipUVs`
- Animated character import: `Triangulate, FlipUVs, GenerateNormals, CalculateTangentSpace, JoinIdenticalVertices, SplitLargeMeshes, ImproveCacheLocality, OptimizeGraph, OptimizeMeshes`
- Preserve authored normals/tangents where possible: `Triangulate, FlipUVs, JoinIdenticalVertices, SplitLargeMeshes, ImproveCacheLocality, OptimizeGraph, OptimizeMeshes`

Frequently used individual flags include `Triangulate`, `FlipUVs`, `GenerateNormals`, `CalculateTangentSpace`, `JoinIdenticalVertices`, `SplitLargeMeshes`, `ImproveCacheLocality`, `OptimizeGraph`, `OptimizeMeshes`, and `SortByPrimitiveType`.

defaultSnippets.label: Static environment preset
defaultSnippets.description: High-quality static environment import flags used by the Sponza-style test scenes.
defaultSnippets.body: CalculateTangentSpace, JoinIdenticalVertices, Triangulate, GenerateNormals, SplitLargeMeshes, ImproveCacheLocality, OptimizeGraph, OptimizeMeshes, SortByPrimitiveType, FlipUVs

defaultSnippets.label: Animated character preset
defaultSnippets.description: Balanced preset for animated FBX-style character imports.
defaultSnippets.body: Triangulate, FlipUVs, GenerateNormals, CalculateTangentSpace, JoinIdenticalVertices, SplitLargeMeshes, ImproveCacheLocality, OptimizeGraph, OptimizeMeshes

defaultSnippets.label: Minimal cleanup preset
defaultSnippets.description: Conservative cleanup when you want fewer import-time transforms.

ZUp.description: Treats the source model as Z-up when true.

GenerateCoacdCollidersPerSubmesh.description: For static models, splits submeshes and auto-attaches CoACD-generated PhysX convex colliders per submesh.

SplitSubmeshesIntoSeparateModelComponent.description: Creates one ModelComponent per imported submesh instead of grouping by source node.

YawPitchRoll.description: Optional Euler rotation offset, in degrees, applied after import.

Translation.description: Optional world-space translation offset to apply to the imported root. Values are engine world units after import scaling.

EPhysicsLibrary.markdownDescription: Supported values: `PhysX`, `Jolt`, `Jitter`. `Physx` is accepted here because existing settings files already use that casing.
